name: Circumstances: Unknown
description:
You have no clue what's happening, nothing at all.

· · ──────── ·✶· ──────── · ·

~

You wake up in a room you recognise only by what you can see. Someone else is already awake, moving around like this is an ordinary morning. They speak to you like they expect you to know what’s going on.
~

[Main Characters]


(Spoilers - discover through playing through the scenario or just select the text!)

Ellie Ward

Hannah Collins

[Premise]

An immersive roleplay with zero context: you are given no information about yourself, the people around you, or the world. Everything is learned only through what you observe and how you respond.

Some details are fixed and some may change on different playthroughs

Feedback in the comments is appreciated but please do not spoil any details about characters or lore!

Update: comments should now be enabled now! They were disabled for some weird reason and I swear I had them enabled...
